task: Flagship expert task: Open-Pit Slope Radar Movement Trigger Review. Reality context: an open-pit mine sees accelerating wall movement and must decide evacuation limits before night shift. Embedded packet: zones: Z1 velocity_mm_day=3.2 accel=0.4 prism_loss=N bench=upper, Z2 velocity=8.7 accel=1.8 loss=Y bench=middle, Z3 velocity=5.1 accel=0.9 loss=N bench=lower; triggers velocity>6 or accel>1.2 red; prism_loss with velocity>4 red; haul_road_exposure zones Z2,Z3. Rules and constraints: Classify zones, recommend exclusion boundaries and monitoring actions. Required work: deliver pit_slope_radar.xlsx + geotech_action_memo.md. The deliverables must include formulas or executable logic, intermediate calculations, row-level citations to the embedded packet, validation checks, uncertainty notes, sensitivity checks around the controlling thresholds, and a final decision table with pass/warn/fail/needs_review labels. Use only the embedded packet. Do not import external data, invent missing values, or hide unresolved assumptions.
